title: AirAsia Cargo India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: AirAsia Cargo India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the AirAsia Cargo India family as a Warehouse Manager in Kochi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About AirAsia Cargo India:
AirAsia Cargo India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AirAsia Cargo India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
